ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This folder will be created in the vault root.
ast.target: 此文件夹将在仓库根目录下创建。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Install Jupytext and matplotlib for specified interpreter using pip.
ast.target: 使用 pip 为指定解释器安装 Jupytext 和 matplotlib。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the command to launch Jupyter notebooks in your preferred editor (e.g., 'code' for VS Code, 'jupyter-lab' for Jupyter Lab, etc.)
ast.target: 指定用于在您首选的编辑器中启动 Jupyter 笔记本的命令（例如，VS Code 使用 'code'，Jupyter Lab 使用 'jupyter-lab' 等）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When disabled, the default Obsidian code block will be used. Requires restart to take effect.
ast.target: 禁用时，将使用默认的 Obsidian 代码块。需要重启才能生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When disabled, linked markdown and Jupyter notebook files will have to be synced manually through the "JupyMD: Sync files" command. Disable if experiencing sync issues.
ast.target: 禁用时，链接的 Markdown 和 Jupyter 笔记本文件需要通过 \"JupyMD: 同步文件\" 命令手动同步。如果遇到同步问题，请禁用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When disabled, changes made in a Jupyter notebook file will always be overwritten by changes made in its paired markdown file. Enabling may cause sync issues.
ast.target: 禁用时，在 Jupyter 笔记本文件中所做的更改将始终被其配对 Markdown 文件中的更改覆盖。启用可能会导致同步问题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, running code from an unpaired note will first create and pair a Jupyter notebook, then execute the requested code.
ast.target: 启用时，从未配对的笔记运行代码将首先创建并配对一个 Jupyter 笔记本，然后执行请求的代码。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Max sync wait time exceeded, proceeding with execution

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Code execution proceeding despite sync being blocked (timeout reached)
ast.target: 尽管同步被阻止（已超时），代码执行仍在继续
